title: Public analytic materials for: Cross-Source Comparability of Aggregate Safety Outcomes in Pivotal Antibody-Drug Conjugate Trials: A Regulatory Evidence Study

creators.name: Lin, Da
creators.affiliation: Department of Ophthalmology, The Second Affiliated Hospital of Wenzhou Medical University

creators.name: Zhang, Yu
creators.affiliation: Department of Ophthalmology, The Second Affiliated Hospital of Wenzhou Medical University

description: Derived analytic tables, comparability decisions, audit outputs, figure source files, and analysis code for a cross-source pharmacovigilance and regulatory evidence study of safety outcome reporting across publications, ClinicalTrials.gov, and FDA reviews of pivotal antibody-drug conjugate trials. Copyrighted full-text articles, publisher supplementary files, and FDA source PDFs are not redistributed.
